case_title: VAOILEFALA TAALE VS. SOSEFINA TUNUFAI et al

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ASOVALE TUNUFAI BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-26-2012 AT 3:30 PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAALE, VAOILEFALA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TUNUFAI, SOSEFINA CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ASOVALE TUNUFAI. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
